title: INSOON Robot Building Toy with Lights, 5 in 1 Robotic Building Set with APP & Remote Control, RC Tech Tracked Tank Car Fighter Jet Model Kit 795 PCS, Educational Gift for Kids Boys Girls Ages 14+
features: 5-in-1 Building Toys – Build and rebuild 5 different models with this technic building kit! Kids can choose to create a tech robot, a one-eyed robot, an all-terrain vehicle, a mechanical triceratops, or a fighter jet (one model at a time). Each robot model features motorized treads for movement, laser accessories, and multiple movable joints—allowing kids to design cool, dynamic poses and enjoy endless creative play

Powerful Performance & Superior Grip – Built with a 7.4V high-speed motor generating 680 RPM and 2.5 kg·cm torque, the tech vehicle building set delivers thrilling acceleration beyond standard 3.7V motors. Every start delivers an instant surge of speed and excitement. Specially designed anti-slip treads provide claw-like traction, enabling stable high-speed performance across any terrain—from smooth floors to rough ground

Cool Lighting & Rechargeable Battery – This rc rechargeable tank robot set features eye-catching, dynamic lighting that cycles through blue, green, and purple while in motion, creating a captivating light show with a futuristic vibe. Equipped with a 300mAh rechargeable lithium battery, it offers 15–20 minutes of continuous runtime per charge. Enjoy long-lasting, repeatable power that keeps the vibrant lights and strong performance going for an immersive and uninterrupted play experience

Dual Control with App & Remote - This 5 in 1 building kits features 2.4GHz remote and smartphone app control, offering an operating range of 30-50 meters. Choose from four modes—path following, gyro sensor, driving, and programming—for versatile movement. With anti-slip treads on each track, it maintains a strong grip and stable high-speed performance on both smooth and rough surfaces. Delivers endless fun for kids(Download the free app by scanning the QR code on the package or product image)

The Perfect Gift – This dynamic robot building set isn't just a perfect holiday present, but an educational toy that blends fun with learning. Beyond high-speed spinning action that sparks excitement, the building and play process enhances children's thinking skills and hand-eye coordination. It makes learning through play enjoyable and engaging. Whether for birthdays, Christmas, or Children's Day, it's a fantastic choice. A perfect gift for boys and girls ages 14+

Kids can choose to create a Tech Robot, a One-Eyed Robot, an All-Terrain Vehicle, a Mechanical Triceratops, or a Fighter Jet (one model at a time) The holiday gift that will light up their face This freely moving robot set is more than just a perfect holiday gift—it's an educational toy that combines fun with learning. Kids will love the excitement of its high-speed movement, all while building logical thinking and hand-eye coordination through hands-on play
